title: Section 27C
content: 1[27C. Provisions of this Act to apply to societies incorporated into All-India Institutes of Medical Science under section 27A.-- All provisions of this Act shall, mutatis mutandis, apply to the societies, referred to in column (2) of the Table given under section 27A, incorporated into All-India Institutes of Medical Sciences referred to in column (3) of the said Table.]
